arts.ttl: Bremer: “The Italian Cup is not enough for me, I want more titles”
arts.sum: Juventus defender Gleison Bremer has his eyes firmly set on adding to the club’s trophy cabinet as the Bianconeri prepare to face RB Leipzig in the Champions League on Wednesday evening. The Brazilian center-back, who has been a cornerstone of Thiago Motta’s rock-solid defense this season, spoke to German outlet Bild ahead of the crucial Group E clash. “When you play for a club like Juventus, the objectives must always be the highest,” Bremer stated. “We’ve already won the Coppa Italia, but I want to win more trophies. However, we’re only at the beginning of our journey. There have been The post Bremer: “The Italian Cup is not enough for me, I want more titles” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus and Lazio Already Priced Out for Former Target
arts.sum: Mason Greenwood has thrived since transferring from Manchester United to Olympique Marseille, fueling the regrets of Juventus and Lazio, which had a chance to sign him last summer. He didn’t transfer for cheap, as the Ligue 1 side spent €26M. The post Juventus and Lazio Already Priced Out for Former Target appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
